'''lapumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izmel|izmel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izmel|izmel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lapumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læpimith|læpimith]] || [[word:læpimij|læpimij]] || [[word:læpimish|læpimish]] || [[word:læpimi|læpimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapupumuth|lapupumuth]] || [[word:lapupumuj|lapupumuj]] || [[word:lapupumush|lapupumush]] || [[word:lapupumu|lapupumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapumuth|lapumuth]] || [[word:lapumuj|lapumuj]] || [[word:lapumush|lapumush]] || [[word:lapumu|lapumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapufmuth|lapufmuth]] || [[word:lapufmuj|lapufmuj]] || [[word:lapufmush|lapufmush]] || [[word:lapufmuf|lapufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lapumuthu|lapumuthu]] || [[word:lapumuju|lapumuju]] || [[word:lapumushu|lapumushu]] || [[word:lapumuku|lapumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lapumuth|lapumuth]] || [[word:lapumuj|lapumuj]] || [[word:lapumush|lapumush]] || [[word:lapumu|lapumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lapumuthul|lapumuthul]] || [[word:lapumujul|lapumujul]] || [[word:lapumushul|lapumushul]] || [[word:lapumukul|lapumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lapumuthuthu|lapumuthuthu]] || [[word:lapumujuju|lapumujuju]] || [[word:lapumushushu|lapumushushu]] || [[word:lapumuku|lapumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lapumuthun|lapumuthun]] || [[word:lapumujun|lapumujun]] || [[word:lapumushun|lapumushun]] || [[word:lapumukun|lapumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lapumuthuoro|lapumuthuoro]] || [[word:lapumujuoro|lapumujuoro]] || [[word:lapumushuoro|lapumushuoro]] || [[word:lapumukuoro|lapumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
